title: <div><tt>+5. **Continuous Integration** – Set up CI scripts to run tests on each
content:
+5. **Continuous Integration** – Set up CI scripts to run tests on each module and on full workflows; enforce coverage thresholds.
+
+### 4.4 Deployment
+
+1. **Infrastructure** – Deploy on scalable GPU/TPU clusters; use message queues for module communication; ensure persistent hypergraph storage.
+2. **Monitoring & Logging** – Instrument modules to log performance, errors and gating decisions; maintain audit ledger for public outputs.
+3. **Drift & Innovation Handling** – Schedule periodic updates to lexicons, grammars and embedding spaces; monitor for unseen patterns and integrate accordingly.
+
+## 5. Copilot Automation Guidance
+
+To ensure GitHub Copilot can implement the RLOS with minimal oversight, provide the following guidance within the repository:
+
+1. **Task Definitions** – Create a `tasks.yaml` or similar file listing each work sequence step (e.g., `build_hypergraph`, `train_phonology`, `deploy_gates`), with description, input dependencies and expected outputs.
